title: Garden Route Badgers Women under pressure
description: CRICKET NEWS - It was another disappointing...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - It was another disappointing weekend for the Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers women's team in the Cricket South Africa Hollywoodbets Professional competition.


> Nicolien Janse van Rensburg and her team suffered consecutive defeats in both the Pro 50 (lost by 168 runs) and Pro20 (lost by 23 runs) against the Titans in Oudtshoorn.


In the Pro50 match the Badgers had the Titans against the ropes at 28/3, but a well-played century by their international star, Suné Luus (110*; 109 balls, 8x4, 1x6) with good support from Gandi Jaftha (60) allowed the Titans to score a total of 250/5 to pave their way to victory.

After a sound start in the Pro20 match, the Badgers did well to restrict the Titans to 123/8 with their score at 70/1, whereafter they lost the plot and ended on 100/9.

The Badgers will now have a steep hill to climb when they take on the strong team of the Lions in Oudtshoorn this weekend.

Summarised score cards:

Pro 50

Titans 250/5 - 50 overs (Sune Luus 114*, Gandhi Jafta 60, Eliz-Mari Marx 33*, Julandi Saayman 2/25, Khayakzi Mathe 2/26).

Garden Route Badgers all out - 26.1 overs (Paulina Mashishi 5/10, Monalisa Legodi 2/8)

Titans won by 168 runs

Pro 20

Titans 123/8 - 20 overs (Robyn Searle 26, Gandhi Jafta 25*, Anneke Bosch 20, Nicolien Janse van Rensburg 2/17).

Garden Route Badgers 100/9 - 20 overs (Jana Nell 23, Micaela Andrews 20, Paulina Mashishi 2/12, Gandhi Jafta 2/18)

Titans won by 23 runs

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
